name: knowbe4-mcp
description: Query KnowBe4 security awareness data — phishing campaigns, training enrollments, user risk scores, and groups — for MSP AI agents.
long_description: Use this server when you need to read security awareness and phishing simulation data from KnowBe4. List phishing campaigns and per-user phishing results, enumerate training campaigns and enrollment status, retrieve user risk scores and click rates, manage user groups, and access account-level configuration. Supports all KnowBe4 API regions (us, eu, ca, uk, de). Read-only reporting API — write operations are not available via this API.

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Your KnowBe4 Reporting API key (from Account Settings > API)

region.title: Region (optional)
region.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the vendor default (us → https://us.api.knowbe4.com). Valid values: us, eu (https://eu.api.knowbe4.com), ca, uk, de. Only set if your KnowBe4 account is on a non-US region.
